data.title: Circulon introduces Circulon Halo with LaserDefense Ceramic Nonstick, PFAs-free, designed for extreme cooking.
data.description: A newly launched product named Circulon Halo with LaserDefense™ Ceramic Nonstick, introduced by cookware innovator Circulon based in Vallejo, California, has been specifically created to endure extreme cooking conditions. This innovative cookware, marking Circulon's 40 years of leadership in the industry, features a PFAs-free* ceramic nonstick coating. The product has been rigorously tested to ensure durability and performance under high heat and intense cooking situations.

data.title: David Arquette partners with Colossal to find artistic kid; winner gets $20,000, exhibit at Minnetrista Museum, and appear on The Joy of Painting. #BloodCancerUnited #fundraising
data.description: A talented emerging artist is set to showcase their artwork at the renowned Minnetrista Museum and will also make an appearance on The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins. In addition, the artist will receive a substantial prize of $20,000. This entire showcase will not only promote their work but also contribute to supporting Blood Cancer United. The event is set to take place in Phoenix on January 13, 2026. This opportunity for the young artist comes through Colossal, a prominent organization known for fundraising on a professional level, with a focus on inspiring others.
US BANCORP SHARES DOWN 1.6% PREMARKET AFTER CO AGREES TO BUY BTIG IN UP TO $1 BILLION DEAL

data.title: MrBeast expands Beast Games Season 2 by placing it inside millions of fortune cookies, blending show's concept with real world experience.
data.description: In a recent update on January 13, 2026, it was announced by MrBeast that the popular show Beast Games Season 2: Strong vs. Smart on Prime Video will be expanding into the real world on a grand scale by incorporating a tradition passed down through generations - cracking open a fortune cookie. This initiative is set to reach a wider audience and marks a new milestone in the show's evolution.

data.title: US stock futures declined, expecting stable annual inflation at 2.7% in December. Nasdaq -0.19%, S&P 500 -0.12%, Dow Jones -0.13%. Alphabet's market value hits $4 trillion. Fed expected to keep rates unchanged.
data.description: U.S. stock futures dropped following a positive Monday close. Annual inflation rate expected to stay at 2.7% in December, with a monthly pace of 0.3%, causing minimal market concerns. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.19% and two-year bond at 3.55%. CME Group's FedWatch tool indicates a 95% chance of no interest rate changes in January. Stock index performance showed decreases: Dow Jones -0.13%, S&P 500 -0.12%, Nasdaq 100 -0.19%, Russell 2000 -0.22%. Top ETFs SPY and QQQ, tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indices, were slightly lower in premarket trading. Alphabet Inc. saw a 0.68% gain and reached $4 trillion in market value amid the AI boom while Apple confirmed Google Gemini will revamp Siri. GOOG maintained a strong price trend, ranked poorly in value. Full details on Benzinga.com.
US DEC. CORE CPI RISES 0.2% M/M; EST. +0.3%
US DEC. CONSUMER PRICES RISE 0.3% M/M; EST. +0.3%

data.title: HawkEye 360 appoints Michael Turner as Chief Legal Officer after his 25 year legal career.
data.description: In Herndon, Virginia on January 13, 2026, HawkEye 360, a prominent signals intelligence data and analytics company, revealed the appointment of Michael Turner as their new Chief Legal Officer, starting in December 2025. With over 25 years of experience in legal and executive roles, Turner's addition to the team signifies a significant move for the company.

data.title: New insights from Crispy Green® highlight "healthy-ish" eating habits shaping new year snacking. January findings reveal the trend of flexibility, flavor, and realistic habits. Nearly 6... (character count: 147)
data.description: In a recent poll conducted by Crispy Green, it was found that amidst the push for fresh beginnings in January 2026, snacking habits remain consistent. The survey revealed that close to 6 percent of respondents prioritize flexibility, flavor, and realistic habits when choosing snacks for the new year. This insight sheds light on how these factors are influencing the reshaping of snacking behaviors.

data.title: Virtual Hangar® launches Jetstimate™, the first live aircraft valuation engine for private aviation, on Jan 13, 2026.
data.description: In New York on January 13, 2026, Virtual Hangar® announced the launch of Jetstimate™, an innovative AI-powered tool that provides immediate value estimates for aircraft. Virtual Hangar is the rapidly expanding private jet booking company that is transforming how travelers book flights. Jetstimate™ offers quick and accurate estimates for aircraft values with simplicity.
NORTH KOREA'S KIM YO JONG SAYS IMPROVEMENT IN INTER-KOREAN RELATIONS IS AN ILLUSION - REPORTS

data.title: InBloom Autism Services opens 3 new centers in Connecticut for children under 5 with autism, expanding ABA therapy.
data.description: In an effort to enhance their services, InBloom Autism Services has announced the establishment of three additional Learning Centers in Connecticut. These centers are dedicated to providing center-based ABA therapy for children who are aged five and under and have been diagnosed with autism spectrum disorder (ASD). The expansion, which was unveiled on January 13, 2026, in Hartford, Connecticut, signifies a significant step towards reaching more individuals in need of specialized care.

data.title: Breaker introduces TruSend™ unified email platform to improve marketing targeting and engagement, addressing tool overload.
data.description: Breaker has launched TruSend™ in reaction to the division of marketing tech stacks. TruSend™ is a consolidated email distribution platform designed to improve targeting and engagement. By tackling the problems associated with using numerous tools simultaneously, Breaker's innovative technology provides marketers with up-to-the-minute insights.

data.title: MDVIP adds 2 primary care practices in the Capital Region: Saratoga Springs and Slingerlands, NY.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 13, 2026, MDVIP revealed that two medical practices in the Capital District have become part of its network. Dr. Sanjay Taneja in Saratoga Springs, NY, and Dr. Joanne Van Woert in Slingerlands, NY are now affiliated with MDVIP. Dr. Van Woert initiated her practice in Slingerlands, adding to the growing network of healthcare providers. This expansion showcases MDVIP's commitment to enhancing accessible and personalized healthcare options in the region.

data.title: Dow dropped before CPI report; Delta's stock plummeted on earnings. Post by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in anticipation of the upcoming CPI inflation report. Delta Airlines' stock also plummeted following their earnings announcement. Live coverage of the stock market today highlighted the Dow's fall and Delta's earnings impact.

data.title: A2Gold reports drilling 2.9 g/t gold over 20m at McIntosh Zone, adds 70m of mineralization at depth. #A2Gold #goldmining
data.description: A2Gold Corp. has released assay results from three core drill holes at its Eastside Gold–Silver Project in Tonopah, Nevada. The company reported 70 meters of mineralization at depth. The project is 100% owned by A2Gold and the company trades on the TSXV under the symbol AUAU and on the OTCQX under the symbol AUXXF.

data.title: PTx Winter Conference in Tremont, Illinois, gathers AGCO leaders, farmers, and experts to discuss ag innovations.
data.description: An event taking place in Tremont, Illinois, is set to unite PTx leaders, agronomists, forward-thinking farmers, and industry specialists. AGCO, a worldwide agricultural machinery and precision ag technology frontrunner, has revealed the revival of the PTx™ Winter gathering in DULUTH, Ga., as of January 13, 2026. AGCO, identified on NYSE as AGCO, is renowned for its prowess in the agricultural sector.

data.title: ADP report: US private employers added 11,750 jobs/week for 4 weeks ending Dec 20, 2025, an increase from previous months.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey on January 13, 2026, it was reported that U.S. private employers added an average of 11,750 jobs per week for the four weeks leading up to December 20, 2025, as per the NER Pulse. This information is derived from the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER). The rate of job growth slightly increased compared to the previous period.

data.title: ACS releases annual report showing milestone 70% 5-year survival rate for all cancers; largest gains for advanced cases. 75th year of analyzing data.
data.description: In its 75th year of analyzing and sharing cancer data, the American Cancer Society published Cancer Statistics, 2026. This report serves as an annual update on the latest findings in the field of cancer research and public health. The release of this data occurred on January 13, 2026, in Atlanta. This marks a significant milestone for the ACS in its ongoing mission to improve public health and combat cancer.

data.title: Decoy Therapeutics partners with Gates Foundation for peptide-conjugate antiviral access in low- and middle-income countries.
data.description: Decoy Therapeutics has secured funding from the Gates Foundation to utilize their platform in making peptide-conjugate antivirals from Decoy's IMP3ACT™ accessible for low- and middle-income nations. The initiative, announced on Jan. 13, 2026, in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. and HOUSTON, aims to provide these treatments on a wider scale.
